CreateApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Panorama Application Instance

CreateJobForDevices.description: Grants permission to create a job for an AWS Panorama Appliance

CreateNodeFromTemplateJob.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Panorama Node

CreatePackage.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Panorama Package

CreatePackageImportJob.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Panorama Package

DeleteDevice.description: Grants permission to deregister an AWS Panorama Appliance

DeletePackage.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Panorama Package

DeregisterPackageVersion.description: Grants permission to deregister an AWS Panorama package version

DescribeApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama application instance

DescribeApplicationInstanceDetails.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama application instance

DescribeDevice.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama Appliance

DescribeDeviceJob.description: Grants permission to view job details for an AWS Panorama Appliance

DescribeNode.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama application node

DescribeNodeFromTemplateJob.description: Grants permission to view details about AWS Panorama application node

DescribePackage.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama package

DescribePackageImportJob.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama package

DescribePackageVersion.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Panorama package version

DescribeSoftware.description: Grants permission to view details about a software version for the AWS Panorama Appliance

GetWebSocketURL.description: Grants permission to generate a WebSocket endpoint for communication with AWS Panorama

ListApplicationInstanceDependencies.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of application instance dependencies in AWS Panorama

ListApplicationInstanceNodeInstances.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of node instances of application instances in AWS Panorama

ListApplicationInstances.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of application instances in AWS Panorama

ListDevices.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of appliances in AWS Panorama

ListDevicesJobs.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of jobs for an AWS Panorama Appliance

ListNodeFromTemplateJobs.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of Nodes for an AWS Panorama Appliance

ListNodes.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of nodes in AWS Panorama

ListPackageImportJobs.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of packages in AWS Panorama

ListPackages.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of packages in AWS Panorama

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of tags for a resource in AWS Panorama

ProvisionDevice.description: Grants permission to register an AWS Panorama Appliance

RegisterPackageVersion.description: Grants permission to register an AWS Panorama package version

RemoveApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to remove an AWS Panorama application instance

SignalApplicationInstanceNodeInstances.description: Grants permission to signal camera nodes in an application instance to pause or resume

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource in AWS Panorama

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource in AWS Panorama

UpdateDeviceMetadata.description: Grants permission to modify basic settings for an AWS Panorama Appliance

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
